entity.description:
New Triple Protection Technology:
Upgraded with Rexona’s best-ever formula which uses MicroDefence-Molecules that are 50% smaller than regular deo molecules to form a tighter, more powerful micro-shield on underarms that effectively stops sweat and odour-causing bacteria. Feel fresh and confident to tackle any challenges that come your way.​

Motionactivated Fragrance:
Fragrance capsules burst with heat and friction, activated by your movement. The more you move, the more bold, woody fragrance is released. Use after every shower – just roll on then roll out the door.​

72h non-stop freshness:
We’re proud to be the first-ever deodorant with 72-hour freshness guaranteed. Try to sweat. We dare you.​ MOVE BEYOND YOUR LIMITS: Rexona believes in everyone’s right to move no matter the limits. We’ve broken the limits of what deodorants can do. Now it's your move. Rexona. It won't let you down.

displayMetadata.name: KEY INFORMATION
displayMetadata.value:
Best Ever Protection from Rexona:​

3x Stronger Protection: Experience All the Thrill, Without the Sweat. Rexona Adventure Antiperspirant Deodorant Gives You 3x Stronger Protection from Sweat and Odour. Tested to Work Even in Malaysia's Hottest and Most Humid Conditions. Stay Unbelievably Fresh and Dry All-Day, You’ll Forget About the Heat. ​

displayMetadata.name: INGREDIENTS
displayMetadata.value: Water, Aluminum Sesquichlorohydrate, Steareth-2, Ppg-15 Stearyl Ether, Steareth-20, Perfume, Calcium Chloride, Glycine, Disodium Edta, Caprylic/Capric Triglyceride, Pentaerythrityl Tetra-Di-T-Butyl Hydroxyhydrocinnamate, Hydrated Silica, Gelatin Crosspolymer (Fish Source), Sodium Benzoate, Bht, Cellulose Gum.

parentCategory.name: Beauty & Personal Care
parentCategory.tagLine: Bath & body, hair care, facial wash & more

metaData.Ingredients: Alcohol, Water, Menthol, Zinc Phenolsulfonate, Fragrance, O-Cymen-5-Ol, PPG-6-Decyltetradeceth-20
metaData.Key Information:
• Contains an anti-bacterial ingredient to fully suppress odor
• Contains a large amount of menthol for a long-lasting super cooling sensation
• Large sheet (25 x 20cm). Requires only one sheet to wipe your whole body
metaData.Preparation:
How to use:
1. Open the seal on the top from the point marked OPEN and pull out one sheet at a time.
2. Close the top seal firmly to prevent the sheets from drying out.

Caution:
• Check your skin condition carefully when using the product. Do not use on abnormal skin conditions. If you see any abnormality including irritation, color loss (white spotting) or darkening of skin, stop using the product and consult a dermatologist.
• Avoid contact with eyes.
• Do not use if you are sensitive to the cooling sensation of menthol or to alcohol, or if you have sensitive skin.
• Do not use near fire.
metaData.SAP Product Name: GATSBY DEODORANT BODY WIPES FREEZE PEACH 10S
metaData.Storage Information:
• Keep out of children's reach.
• Do not discharge this product in a flush toilet because this sheet is not soluble in water.
• Do not place the product under high temperatures.
• This product may leak if it is accidentally pressed on such as inside a bag.
• Use this product as soon as possible after opening.

metaData.Ingredients: Butane, Alcohol Denat., Isobutane, Propane, Parfum, Butyloctanoic Acid, Methyl, Phenylbutanol, Maris Limus Extract, Ostrea Shell Extract, Persea Grastissima Oil, Octyldodecanol, Aqua, Propylene Glycol
metaData.Key Information:
• Long lasting freshness with ocean extracts
• 48 hours deodorant protection and Nivea Men Care Complex
• Skin tolerance dermatologically proven
metaData.Preparation:
• Directions:
Hold can 15cm from the underarm and spray
• Important:
1. Do not spray on an open flame or other ignition source
2. Do not spray into eyes
3. Do not apply to irritated or damaged skin
4. Use exclusively for the intended purpose
metaData.Storage Information:
• Keep out of reach of children
• Keep away from heat, hot surfaces, sparks, open flames and other ignition sources
• Do not expose to temperatures exceeding 50°C
• Protect from sunlight
• Do not pierce or burn even after use
• Extremely flammable aerosol
• Pressurised container may burst if heated
• Give only empty bottle to recycling process
